calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Gary Morris. Harrison Gunther (Benificiary) also present.

Ms. Navia stated that Jose Rodriguez had given verbal consent but that she was not able to obtain a written consent as he was in Mexico. In addition, she identified Harrison Gunther and stated that he agreed with the distribution as to Mr. Ralulu. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bobby Mann.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
